title: Hacking the Calendar
excerpt: I’d like to map the calendar to our Agile sprint schedule but can’t find a way to do that directly. What I was thinking as a hack workaround is to have a dropdown column where an item can be associated with a sprint in t…

posts.author: nhatter (Natalie Hatter)
posts.cookedHtml: I’d like to map the calendar to our Agile sprint schedule but can’t find a way to do that directly. What I was thinking as a hack workaround is to have a dropdown column where an item can be associated with a sprint in the release and that would trigger an automation to associate a date range which would then show up in the calendar. Has anyone done this that can help?
